title: senna formosa
intro: Senna formosa, also known as Taiwan senna, is a plant species in the legume family native to Taiwan and southern China, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and pods contain anthraquinone glycosides, which have been used to treat various health issues due to their laxative and purgative properties. The medicinal properties of Senna formosa have been found to have several health benefits, including relieving constipation, reducing fever, and aiding in weight loss. Senna formosa can be prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, typically consumed in small amounts to avoid adverse effects, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
